title: viola × murrii
intro: Viola × murrii, also known as the hybrid viola, is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola sororia var. sororia, resulting in a unique and resilient plant species. The medicinal properties of Viola × murrii include its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Viola × murrii include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. Herbal preparations of Viola × murrii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
